name: Time Duration Calculator
description: Calculate the duration between two times.
formulaDescription: Computes the hours and minutes between two times. If end time is earlier, it assumes the next day.

example.explanation: From 09:00 to 17:30 is 8 hours 30 minutes (510 minutes).

faqs.question: What makes this calculator accurate?
faqs.answer: This calculator uses standard mathematical formulas and conventions. All inputs are processed in real-time.

faqs.question: Can I use this for professional purposes?
faqs.answer: Yes, this calculator follows standard conventions but always verify important results independently.

faqs.question: How are decimal places handled?
faqs.answer: Results are rounded to 2-3 decimal places for practical use, but full precision is preserved internally.

faqs.question: Is there a limit to input size?
faqs.answer: Inputs are limited to practical values; extremely large numbers may affect precision due to floating-point math.

faqs.question: Can I save my calculations?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can screenshot results or export them using your browser's built-in tools.

faqs.question: What units does this use?
faqs.answer: Check the input field labels for specific units. You can convert units using our Unit Converter calculator.

concept: This calculator helps you solve everyday utility problems quickly and accurately.
introduction: Quickly calculate time duration calculator using this easy-to-use calculator.
guideSteps: Enter your values in the input fields above.
Click the Calculate button to get your result instantly.
Review the detailed breakdown provided below.
Take a screenshot or note down the result for your records.
standards: All calculations follow standard mathematical conventions.
Results are rounded to 2 decimal places for practical use.
Supports both metric and imperial units where applicable.
Calculations update in real-time as you enter values.
